mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sys_user WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE is_deleted = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE ai_status = 'FAILED'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE ai_status = 'FAILED'

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE is_deleted = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE is_deleted = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 1) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE is_deleted = 1)

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE is_deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE is_deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE is_deleted = 0) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE is_deleted = 0)

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM listening_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reading_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM writing_record WHERE user_id = #{userId}) + (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM speaking_record WHERE user_id = #{userId})
